challenge.title: Korak 3
challenge.description:
Dok radiš na funkciji, bilo bi korisno imati poziv funkcije za namenu debagovanja, pa kreiraj varijablu poem, van funkcije, koja sadrži ovaj poem:

Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and bright
until the end of the night

Možeš koristiti višelinijski niz za to.

I onda, pozovi funkciju sa varijablom poem kao argumentom.

tests.text: You should have a global variable named poem.
The poem variable should have a value equal to Stars and the moon shine in the sky white and bright until the end of the night.
tests.testString:
({
    test: () => runPython(`
    pm = """Stars and the moon
    shine in the sky
    white and bright
    until the end of the night"""
    assert _Node(_code).find_variable('poem').is_equivalent(f'poem = """{pm}"""')
    `)
})

tests.text: You should call the function pin_extractor with poem as argument.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poems):
    secret_codes = []
    for poem in poems:
        secret_code = ''
        lines = poem.split('\n')
        for line_index, line in enumerate(lines):
            words = line.split()
            if len(words) > line_index:
                secret_code += str(len(words[line_index]))
            else:
                secret_code += '0'
        secret_codes.append(secret_code)
    return secret_codes

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and
until the end of the night"""

poem2 = 'The grass is green\nhere and there\nhoping for rain\nbefore it turns yellow'
poem3 = 'There\nonce\nwas\na\ndragon'

print(pin_extractor([poem, poem2, poem3]))
